title: noccaea brevicaulis
intro: Noccaea brevicaulis, also known as Alison or Small Alison, is a perennial plant species in the mustard family (Brassicaceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Noccaea brevicaulis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory issues.
